title: Cuneiform Tablet #0962: Neo-Babylonian Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
